title: Wise Blood
author: Flannery O'Connor
content: “The truth is not a thing that you can get your hands on, but a thing that gets its hands on you.”
action: Yield to the weight of evidence.

title: All the King's Men
author: Robert Penn Warren
content: “Man is conceived in sin and born in corruption and he passeth from the stink of the didie to the stench of the shroud.”

title: The Age of Innocence
author: Edith Wharton
content: “It was not a question of what she wanted, but of what she could do.”
